meaning: n.微波(波长为1毫米至30厘米的高频电磁波)
examples: A microwave is a good investment.
The microwave will bleep when your meal is ready.
The microwave beeps to let you know when it has finished.
As a recent article explained, exchanges are building microwave towers in order to avoid fiber-optic cable.
Does anyone still pay top dollar for a CD player, fax machine or microwave oven?
